title: dactylis glomerata subsp. hispanica
intro: Dactylis glomerata subsp. hispanica, commonly known as Iberian couch grass, is a subspecies of the Dactylis glomerata plant, a type of perennial grass. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Dactylis glomerata subsp. hispanica can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it may also be used in capsule or tincture form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
